name: 奢华氛围渲染

prompt_template.type: luxury product photography with atmospheric effects
prompt_template.subject: {product_description}
prompt_template.atmosphere: wisps of smoke, floating petals, light particles
prompt_template.lighting: dramatic rim light + cool ambient fill
prompt_template.background: infinite dark void with subtle gradient

defaults.surface: polished obsidian or black marble platform
defaults.lighting: golden rim light from upper-left, cool blue backlight

overrides.atmosphere: fresh flower petals floating at various heights catching light, scattered gold leaf particles
multi-layered violet and midnight blue smoke swirling around product
golden bokeh particles, warm amber glow, scattered gold flakes
floating ice crystals, frost patterns, diamond-like light refractions

category_tips.fragrance: multi-layer smoke + matching botanical elements, amber liquid visible inside
category_tips.skincare: ethereal glow around product, subtle condensation, dreamy quality
category_tips.jewelry: diamond-like light bokeh, dark background, sparkle and reflection focus
category_tips.wine: rich amber or ruby liquid, smoke wisps matching color, candlelight warmth
category_tips.chocolate: warm golden particles, cocoa powder dust, rich dark tones
category_tips.watch: sharp metallic reflections, precise time visible, ice-blue or golden accent

examples: Luxury product photography with atmospheric effects. {product} on polished dark surface, surrounded by wisps of purple-blue smoke. Dramatic rim light. Deep black background. 8K, cinematic quality

Premium atmospheric product rendering. {product} on black marble veined with gold. Floating flower petals and gold leaf particles. Multi-point lighting: golden rim light + cool backlight. Dark void background, 8K
